title: Masters the Swarm
summary: Insects. Rats. Bats. Even birds. You master one type of small creature that obeys you.
tiers: Tier 3: Living Armor or Skill With Attacks
Tier 6: Deadly Swarm or Skill With Defense
gm_intrusions: A command is misunderstood. Control is erratic or is lost. Bites and stings are not uncommon for masters of the swarm.
text: Insects. Rats. Bats. Even birds. You master one type of small creature that obeys you.
details: Insects. Rats. Bats. Even birds. You master one type of small creature that obeys you.
